title: Leaf Christmas Berry Sprays Artificial, Blue
features: 70cm Artificial Blue Christmas Berry Spray. Single stem 70cm measurement from end to end when flat - these can be combined in groups to make the display pictured in our example
Stems are wired and can be shaped to suit your space. This is a bare stem plant supplied unpotted
These can be put inside a planter (see our example images) or combined with other plants for a larger display. No planter is included with this plant
This is a single stem only - if you need a group as shown in the example images please purchase more than one.
